feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP VIM Analytics - Table Query
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know how can i access these tables of VIM to query data. I have tried Tables SWWLOGHIST/SWWUSERWI/SWWIHEAD but these dont seem to be the data im looking for.

Anybody know where i can find that information?

entry.title: how to open a connection from S4/HANA to other database
entry.content:
how to open a connection from S4/HANA to oracle.

we are in the process to setup s4/HANA and we need to be able:

  1.  to connect from s4/HANA to another database (oracle on premise)
  2. We need to connect from on premise oracle database to s4/HANA

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: KPI display error
entry.content: For some reason, the dashboard is not being shown to a user, despite installing Adobe Flash Player it is not working

entry.title: How to restrict access to specific cost centers in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content: Currently in SAP ECC there are display access restrictions to certain cost centers, now I need to know how to restrict access to specific cost centers in SAP S4 HANA. Is there any authorization object?

entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am trying to prepare two variants of a report (Manage ** app) and I am having some issues.

I prepare the reports, and I successfully save them as tiles and the tile quick info shows the correct result (6 and 122  - count of returned rows) but when I click on the custom tile the report is defaulted to the general variant.

According to the documentation the functionality should be available: 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_em92/9.2/en-US/71/a972114577451aa29429183ba9b07f/frameset.htm

So my question is: What must I do that when I click on the custom tile SAP will show the relevant data (the 6 or 122 rows as represented in the quick result of the tile)?

Thank you for you help.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: ERROR=CANNOT USE DUPLICATE TRIGGER NAME
entry.content:
our application have this error randomly when import a company schema. the flow we take is

ERROR=CANNOT USE DUPLICATE TRIGGER NAME xxxx

1. create an empty schemaB

2. create an empty schemaB1

3. import sourceSchemaA."*" as BINARY from '/hana/dump/2024-09-03 14:00:53_sourceCompanyA_targetCompanyB with replace rename schema sourceSchemaA1 to schemaB1, sourceSchemaA to schemaB, globalSchemaA to globalSchemaB NO DEPENDENCIES

the import only happen once but still get this error.

What's the possible reason?

#Hana

entry.title: Can I add rows to an existing SAP HANA table from a python dataframe?
entry.content: hana_ml.dataframe.create_dataframe_from_pandas() allows me to create a new SAP HANA table from the data of a python dataframe. However if that HANA table already exists and contains data, I just want to add more rows to it. Is that also possible? Or do I have to create a temporary table via create_dataframe_from_pandas and then move the rows to the real table?

entry.title: Install HANA DP Agent on Linux, Error Segmentation fault (core dumped)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I installed HANA DP Agent on a Linux linux/amd64 (ubuntu:22.04) based docker image and get the following error when opening agentcli.sh:

 

dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ cd HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64/
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64$ ./hdbinst --silent --batch --path="/usr/sap/dataprovagent" --agent_listener_port=5050 --agent_admin_port=5051
SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent installation kit detected.


SAP HANA Lifecycle Management - dataprovagent Installation 2.7.5.0.0
********************************************************************


Checking installation...
Preparing package 'dataprovagent'...
Preparing package 'Installer'...
Installing SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent to /usr/sap/dataprovagent...
Installing package 'dataprovagent'...
Installing package 'Installer'...
#####################################################################
IMPORTANT NOTE:
#####################################################################
You have installed Data Provisioning Agent with default settings. The default settings use insecure channel to communicate with HANA server. For secure communication, SSL settings must be configured via the Data Provisioning Agent Configuration tool after the installation is complete. Please see SAP HANA Smart Data Integration Installation and Configuration Guide for details on configuring SSL between the Agent and HANA server.
#####################################################################
Installation done
Log file written to '/var/tmp/hdb_dataprovagent_2024-09-24_08.27.13_23/hdbinst_dataprovagent.log' on host 'cf985f15681e'.
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64$ cd ..
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ ls
DataAssurance                IMDB_DPAGENT200_07P_50-70002516.ZIP  SIGNATURE.SMF  adapters    artifacts.xml  camel          doc      dpagent.ini        dpproxy  features  krb5  log       p2       sapjvm  ssl  versions.txt  workspace
HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64  LogReader                            Trigger        agentutils  bin            configuration  dpagent  dpagentconfig.ini  ds-lite  install   lib   manifest  plugins  sec     ui   webservice
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ ./bin/agentcli.sh --configAgent 
./bin/agentcli.sh: 4: [[: not found
Configuring the Agent at the following location:
/usr/sap/dataprovagent

./bin/agentcli.sh: 15: [[: not found
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$

 

Does anyone had the issue regarding "Segmentation fault (core dumped)"?

Thank you and best regards
Tim

// Logfile attached

entry.title: is there any APIs are available for HANA to Park the invoice?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is there any APIs are available for Parking the invoice

 

Thanks

entry.title: Get all tables mapped to an OBJECTCLASS in CDHDR
entry.content:
Dear all

I like to know a way to get all SAP ERP tables that get updated when an entry for a particular OBJECTCLASS is logged in CDHDR table. I see that there is an entry logged in CDHDR with OBJECTCLASS called "BELEG". I understood that this could mean several tables like BSEG, BKPF, BSID, BSAD have got documents updated within them.

I noticed that updates (Us) in SAP ERP are not getting logged in CDPOS table. So, I like to rely on CDHDR and get list of all tables that got updated for a particular UDATE & OBJECTCLASS. Using this, I will check if data is fresh in my target system (Databricks).

appreciate ideas/thoughts.

Br,

Noor.

entry.title: Scheduled Backup Failures on SAP HANA Tenant Database
entry.content:
We are encountering recurring issues with the scheduled daily data backup for one of our tenant databases,  on our SAP HANA server Our server hosts three tenant databases.

The above said database backup fails once or twice a week, and the failures occur under varying conditions:

  1. Stale PID Issue:
    • Sometimes the error log indicates that the backup process has stale PIDs.
    • Upon checking the PID file (located in /var/log/SAPBusinessOne/BackupService/logs/abc-hana_30015/XXX_LIVE.pid), we find multiple PIDs associated with the same schema.
    • Deleting the older PIDs resolves the issue, and the backup completes successfully after that.
  2. Backup Failure without Stale PID:
    • At other times, the backup fails without the stale PID issue. In these cases, the only solution we’ve found is to stop the HANA services and restart the operating system. Once restarted, the backupserver proceeds without issues.

what is the issue related for this and what actions should we follow to resolve the matter

I am eagerly seeking support from this esteemed community.

entry.title: Which way of S4 Hana system implementation is suggested, if client is new to SAP and or old to SAP?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Ref. to subject mentioned. can you through some light on it.!

Because, yesterday I have attended an interview for SAP Head position in Hyd in a product based company especially a Manufacturing industry, they were saying they are using sap from past 20 years (this is a bid wonder?), but the company is 30 years old. and recently 2 years ago they have to SAP S4 Hana system.

However still they are not happy, says that they have lot of gaps in their system after implementing SAP S4Hana, not sure, if they have implemented green field implementation (meaning from the scratch, need to build the organization into new S4 Hana ERP system, Fiori based).

And also said that, they have these concerns mentioning below: 

-1). People issue (might be their company people /business have not cooperated and or supported during migration)

-2). Data inputs have not given properly,

-3). Systems issues

feeling, all these because the work is not done properly in the first 3 phases of Activate methodology. Discover, Prepare and Explore phases were not fully utilized, meaning the activities and or task were not well taken care, is it not?

Otherwise, they have now still gaps, and the management were not happy, cause they reports or dash board are not meeting as per their expectation, due to that, management is not able to take proper decision and or they is a delay in that or lagging... resulting in that, they are not satisfied it seems. And they said that, it as implemented by a Pune based sap implementation partner.!

but one thing asked since they are old to sap 20 years, still their system is not fully stabilized.. so is it not because of something else, that is just influence of owners? because its a private limited company. One man army show, so feeling sap have developed a methodology to utilize and implement the new system for their industry for better way of digitization of their enterprise right?  And the results are as expected, provided when the companies follow better, and leverage all the best practices and implemented, right?

So, need your expert opinion, what might be the causes, best possible suggestions.!

Appreciate your expertise thoughts.!

Thanks in advance,

Regards.

Er.K.S.

entry.title: sap fiori road map on on-premise and cloud platform
entry.content: HI any One can Explain the sap fiori road map on on-premise and what are the steps we can take when we configure on-premise to cloud platform.

entry.title: Need a way to access the contents of a table via a program on S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Due to changes in Module "VIEW_AUTHORITY_CHECK" in latest release S/4HANA 2023 (on-premise), we are unable to pass authority check for table USRACL via program. We get an exception "INVALID_ACTION" on S/4HANA 2023, though any lower S/4 release passes the authority check properly.

Please let us know any alternate way of accessing this table.

Regards,

Bhavya

entry.title: Inquiry About Changing SAP SID and HANA DB SID in On-Premise High-Availability SAP System
entry.content:
Subject: Inquiry About Changing SAP SID and HANA DB SID in On-Premise High-Availability SAP System

 

 

I would like to inquire whether it is possible to change the SAP SID and HANA DB SID in an on-premise SAP system configured for High-Availability. If such a change is feasible, could you kindly provide the detailed steps or procedure required for performing this operation?

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I reduce the value of a posted Asset
entry.content:
Hello members. I am new to SAP and seeking your valuable advice.

We are using S4 HANA in the company. There is an Asset for which we posted the incorrect value and now we need to decrease the value. How can I do it? 

will appreciate your help.

entry.title: Migration:- SAP HANA Database copy/move of tenant database
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

We are Migrating our on-Premise HANA database to Cloud Azure.  Below are more details. 
*********************************************************************************************************************>
On-premises setup: Multi node(3 hosts),Standalone HANA DB with XSA on separate tenant DB.

Nodes: 
node1, node2, node3

Tenant DB’s:
BHP - System DB
BHP – XSA installed
GHP - Client Data

Versions:
HANA:           :2.00.059.1713941539
XSA             :v1.1.3.230717145654
OS              :RHEL7.9


CLOUD Setup: Single Node, Standalone PERSON_NAME DB with XSA on separate tenant DB.

Tenant DB’s:
BHP - System DB
BHP – XSA installed
GHP - Client Data

Versions:
HANA:           :SAP HANA 2 SPS07 Revision 075.00
XSA             :v1.1.8.240122150851
OS              :RHEL9
*********************************************************************************************************************

And, was going through all possible Data migration approach & found below SAP document. On top of this have few questions. 

Copying and Moving Tenant Databases:-

 

Questions:- (If possible kindly do share SAP document/Note to justify answer)

1. Copy/Paste from Multi Node Source DB to Single Node target HANA, will it support ?

2. Copy/Paste for XSA tenant DB also support ? If yes is there any version dependency, like Target should be same as source or Target should be Higher ?

3. How much time will it take to copy/move 1 TB of DB ? (Approx)

4. After one time copy/move, will it act as real time replication (Apply all changes from source to Target) until we run below command ? ==> ALTER DATABASE <new_database_name> FINALIZE REPLICA

5. Is there any OS dependency or restriction for this Copying and Moving Tenant Databases. 
   Source RHEL 7.9 to Target RHEL 9

Thanks & Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error: update-rc.d: error: unkown option
entry.content:
An error occurred during the installation of the SAP HANA Server:

Error checking sapinit
   Starting external program update-rc.d
      Command line is: update-rc.d -n sapinit defaults
      Output line 1: update-rc.d: error: unkown option
      Output line 2: usage: update-rc.d [-f] <basename> remove
      Output line 3:        update-rc.d [-f] <basename> defaults
      Output line 4:        update-rc.d [-f] <basename> defaults-disabled
      Output line 5:        update-rc.d <basename> disable|enable [S|2|3|4|5]
      Output line 6:            -f: force
      Output line 7:
      Output line 8: The disable|enable API is not stable and might change in the future.
      Program terminted with exit code 1

The server is running on Debian 12. I have already tried the workaround without success.

Are there any ideas or solutions to solve the problem?

entry.title: Join BSEG, BKPF, EKBE and EKPO
entry.content:
Hello, I am working on a sql S/4 HANA db.

Anyone has an idea how to join the tables BSEG, BKPF with EKBE and EKPO. 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP HANA Unique Constraint Violated Error [301]
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In our SAP HANA database, we're adding a row to a table with a query from MII Workbench when our machine creates a product. When we trying to add, query returns this message;

 

com.sap.xmii.Illuminator.logging.LHException: com.sap.sql.exception.OpenSQLIntegrityConstraintViolationException: [301]: unique constraint violated: Table(CURING_LOG), Index(_SYS_TREE_CS_#199412_#0_#P0) with error: unique constraint violation on pos=0 for table OMQ::CURING:CURING_LOG$delta_1$en, key: $trexexternalkey$=2024-10-04;23:17:04;5,DNZ5R already exists as udiv=24121, indexname=_SYS_TREE_CS_#199412_#0_#P0

               OpenSQLExceptionCategories: [NON_TRANSIENT, INTEGRITY_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION]

Our table's constraint are 3 columns ; ZBITIS_T , ZBITIS_S and ARBPL as shown in below ;

and the _SYS_TREE_CS_#199412_#0_#P0 is this ;

What I understand, error message tells me that I'm trying to add a record that already exist in the table. There has to be a record that equals in ZBITIS_T, ZBITIS_S and ARBPL with the record that I'm trying to. But there is not. I'm certain that we trying to write record only once. 

And somehow, record writes to table successfully but that error message comes also.

So my question is to you, how could this happening ? Why am I seeing that error message even the record can be seen in table ?

Thanks,
